text.content:
Blood Sorcery Rituals — Level 3

Warding Circle vs Kindred

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 1 hour

Ingredients: Vitae of the caster traced in a circle, bone dust

Creates an invisible circle that no vampire can willingly cross. Kindred who force their way through suffer aggravated damage. Lasts until sunrise.

Firewalker

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 30 minutes

Ingredients: A candle flame extinguished with vitae

Grants the caster resistance to fire for the remainder of the night. Fire damage is reduced and Rotschreck difficulties are lowered.

Incorporeal Passage

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 10 minutes

Ingredients: A shard of mirror smeared with vitae

Allows the caster to pass through a single solid barrier — wall, door, or floor — as though it were not there. One passage per casting.

Pavis of Foul Presence

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 20 minutes

Ingredients: Vitae painted on the caster's forehead (invisible to mortals)

Wards the caster against Presence powers. Any Presence attempt directed at the caster is reflected back upon the user for the remainder of the scene.

Shaft of Belated Quiescence

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 3 nights preparation + 10 minutes casting

Ingredients: A wooden stake soaked in vitae for three nights

Enchants a wooden stake so that it splinters inside the target on impact, releasing a paralytic blood magic effect. Even if the heart is missed, the target is immobilized for a time.
